items.title: The Bucks to re-sign Gary Trent Jr. to 4-year, $64-million contract.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
The Bucks to re-sign Gary Trent Jr. to 4-year, $64-million contract.

It is the 8th largest free agent deal this offseason & he becomes the 23rd highest paid shooting guard in the NBA.

The $16M annually is the 10th largest number this summer & 26th in the NBA.

www.jsonline.com/story/sports...

media.title: Milwaukee Bucks to re-sign Gary Trent Jr. to 4-year, $64-million contract
media.description: The Milwaukee Bucks are set to re-sign guard Gary Trent Jr. to a 4-year, $64 million contract. Trent opted out of his minimum contract in June.

items.title: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: Sixers close the half strong and the Pacers do not. Sixers up 59-45 at the break. Pacers 13 of 30 from the floor, 4 of 15 from 3, 8 of 11 at the line. Sixers 22 of 40, 5 of 15, 5 of 8. Jalen Slawson eight points. Johnni Broome 17, Matt Rogers 14, Labaron Philon 13 for Philly.

items.title: Summer Pacers down 59-45 at half to the 76ers.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Pacers down 59-45 at half to the 76ers.

They have 10a on 13FGs and are getting it across mid-court in 3secs or less most times. Slawson has 8pts, Mast and Brooks Jr. have 7. And they’re just 4/16 from deep.

items.title: Halftime: Sixers 59, Pacers 45. Broome with 17 and 7. Philon with 13 points and 2 assists. Another strong effort from the guys the Sixers want to see thrive in this environment.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Sixers 59, Pacers 45. Broome with 17 and 7. Philon with 13 points and 2 assists. Another strong effort from the guys the Sixers want to see thrive in this environment.

items.title: Reed just hit the floor chasing a loose ball out of bounds along with Gillespie. Posted a story on it today, but it's worth repeating: Reed's coaches, teammates love how active, physical he is.
